steps.title: Clear the decimals
steps.content: Multiply the first equation by $10$: $$-9y=8x+22,$$ so $$8x+9y=-22.$$ Rewrite the second equation as $$3x+4y=18.$$

steps.title: Eliminate y
steps.content: Multiply $8x+9y=-22$ by $4$ to get $$32x+36y=-88.$$ Multiply $3x+4y=18$ by $9$ to get $$27x+36y=162.$$ Subtract the second equation from the first: $$5x=-250.$$
